faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking your wrap.

items.q: How long does a full wrap take?
items.a: A full car wrap typically takes 3–5 business days depending on vehicle size and complexity. Commercial vehicle wraps may take longer.

items.q: How long will my wrap last?
items.a: With proper care, a quality vinyl wrap lasts 5–7 years. We use premium Avery Dennison and 3M materials with UV protection.

items.q: Can I wash my wrapped vehicle?
items.a: Yes! Hand washing is recommended. Avoid automatic car washes with brushes, high-pressure jets, and harsh chemicals for the first week.

items.q: Will the wrap damage my original paint?
items.a: No — wraps actually protect your original paint. When removed professionally, your OEM paint will be in the same condition as when applied.

items.q: Do you offer warranty on your wraps?
items.a: Yes. We offer a 3-year installation warranty on Pro packages and 5 years on Elite. Material warranties are covered by the manufacturer.

items.q: Can you match a custom color?
items.a: Absolutely. We have access to thousands of colors and can work with custom color mix orders through our premium material partners.

aboutPage.title: BUILT BY ENTHUSIASTS
aboutPage.subtitle: Martin Wrap Studio was born out of a passion for cars and a desire to elevate the standard of vehicle wrapping to a true art form.
aboutPage.storyTitle: FROM A GARAGE TO A PREMIUM STUDIO
aboutPage.quote: We started Martin Wrap Studio because we were tired of seeing great cars ruined by mediocre wraps.
aboutPage.storyP1: In 2016, Martin started Martin Wrap Studio in a small 2-bay garage with a single installer and a vision: to bring European-quality car wrapping to the local automotive scene.
aboutPage.storyP2: After training with some of the world's most respected wrap studios, Martin returned with a level of expertise rarely seen outside top-tier performance shops. The results spoke for themselves — word spread fast.
aboutPage.storyP3: Today, Martin Wrap Studio operates from a purpose-built 10,000 sq ft temperature-controlled studio. Our team of certified specialists has transformed over 1,200 vehicles — from weekend track cars to supercar collections and entire commercial fleets.
aboutPage.storyP4: We're not just a wrap shop. We're the team behind some of the most jaw-dropping vehicles you'll see on the street.
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Get in touch and let's talk about transforming your vehicle.
